name: llamahire
description: Development and integration-test tooling for LlamaHire.

scripts.fixtures:generate: wp-env --config=.wp-env.ci.json run cli wp llamahire fixtures generate --scenario=small

scripts.fixtures:cleanup: wp-env --config=.wp-env.ci.json run cli wp llamahire fixtures cleanup --yes
